name: Yii2 & React Full-Stack Development
postCreateCommand: sudo rm -f /etc/apt/sources.list.d/yarn.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y default-mysql-server libmariadb-dev nodejs npm && sudo docker-php-ext-install pdo_mysql || true && sudo sh -c 'echo "extension=pdo_mysql.so" > /usr/local/etc/php/conf.d/docker-php-ext-pdo_mysql.ini' && sudo service mariadb start && echo 'Aguardando MariaDB...' && until sudo mariadb-admin ping >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done && sudo mariadb -u root < ${containerWorkspaceFolder}/backend/schema.sql && sudo mariadb -u root -e "CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS 'webrpg_app'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY 'webrpgapp'; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON db_webrpg.* TO 'webrpg_app'@'localhost'; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;" && sudo npm install -g n && sudo n lts && cd backend && composer install && sudo apt install -y git-lfs && git lfs install
